g.text: Explorer as relative behavioural deviation from the searcher

text.style: fill: #555555; font: 8.5px 'Latin Modern Roman', 'TeX Gyre Termes', 'DejaVu Serif', 'Times New Roman', serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: Ratios are explorer/searcher. Values below 1 mean the explorer has a lower value for that diagnostic; distance ratios above 1 indicate separation.
